title: Dri Aire 2 * 700G Refill Bag Compatible With Premium Moisture Absorber L Size Helps Prevent Damp Mould And Condensation Fast Moisture Absorption For Home
features: High Capacity Moisture Absorption: The Dri Aire 2*700G Refill Bag quickly absorbs excess moisture from the air, helping to keep your home dry and comfortable while protecting walls, furniture, and personal belongings.

Protects Against Damp And Mould: Designed to prevent damp, mould, and condensation, the Dri Aire Refill Bag ensures a healthier living environment by reducing moisture-related damage efficiently and effectively.

Simple And Easy To Use: Just place each bag into your Premium Moisture Absorber L Size unit. No complex setup is needed, making it a convenient and hassle-free solution for controlling household moisture.

Long-Lasting Performance: Each 700g bag absorbs up to 1.2 litres of water. With two refill bags included, you get reliable, long-lasting protection, keeping your rooms dry for extended periods without frequent replacements.

Compact And Practical Design: The Dri Aire 2*700G Refill Bags are lightweight and discreet, allowing you to place them in small or hard-to-reach areas while maintaining a fresh, dry, and comfortable atmosphere throughout your home.
description: Keep your home dry and comfortable with the Dri Aire 2*700G Refill Bag. Compatible with the Premium Moisture Absorber L Size, each bag absorbs up to 1.2 litres of moisture, helping prevent damp, mould, and condensation. Easy to use, effective, and long-lasting, it’s the ideal solution for any room.
